title: [low] podman-remote: pod kill: does not do proper signal validation
body:
```console
$ MYSOCK=unix:/tmp/mypodmansock
$ ./bin/podman system service --timeout=0 $MYSOCK &
[1] 467524

$ ./bin/podman-remote --url $MYSOCK pod kill -s 0 nosuchpod
Error: unable to find pod "nosuchpod": no such pod
```
Expected: `Error: invalid signal: 0`

comments.body: Hm. I bet this is an ordering this. I'll take this one.

Think I found it - missing return statement. Oops.

I wonder if we can get lint to catch this sort of thing...
